name: gemini-writing-copilot
description: Proactively route Codex prose work to Antigravity/Gemini with auto context, templates, and quality checks.

interface.shortDescription: Proactively route prose work to Antigravity/Gemini.
interface.longDescription: Gemini Writing Copilot makes Codex more willing to hand off prose deliverables to Google Antigravity's local agy CLI by default, with the older Gemini Web cookie client kept as a fallback. Its skill routing is tuned for drafting, rewriting, polishing, translation, summaries, docs prose, PR descriptions, release notes, emails, announcements, blog posts, proposals, and product copy. It now adds task auto-detection, automatic style profile defaults, Gemini-authored task templates, safe git project-context collection, routing evals, and a source-grounding quality gate for prose work while leaving coding, debugging, and architectural judgment to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Polish this paragraph in natural Korean.
Draft release notes from this change summary.
Write a PR description from these changes.
